# Invictus AI — Dental Demo Showcase

> Invictus AI builds AI-powered websites for local businesses in India. This showcase features 5 dental clinic website demos, each with a unique design theme, serving as templates for real dental practices in Pune.

## Demo Sites

- [Bright Smile Dental Clinic](https://invictus-dental-demos.vercel.app/01-bright-smile-teal/) — Teal & Gold theme, Kothrud, Pune
- [SmileCare Dental Clinic](https://invictus-dental-demos.vercel.app/02-navy-modern/) — Navy & Modern theme, Baner, Pune
- [Sunshine Dental Studio](https://invictus-dental-demos.vercel.app/03-coral-cream/) — Coral & Cream theme, Koregaon Park, Pune
- [GreenLeaf Dental Wellness](https://invictus-dental-demos.vercel.app/04-forest-green/) — Forest Green theme, Viman Nagar, Pune
- [Aura Dental Studio](https://invictus-dental-demos.vercel.app/05-dark-purple/) — Dark Purple theme, Hinjewadi, Pune

## About Invictus AI

Invictus AI delivers enterprise-grade AI solutions at startup speed. We specialize in AI-powered websites, chatbots, and automation systems for local businesses across India — dental clinics, CA firms, pathology labs, and 20+ other niches.

Website: https://invictus-ai.in
Contact: hello@invictus-ai.in
